data.body: Fix implemented: Added --findings-file PATH flag to record-review.sh (lines 69, 88-95, 127-133). When a reviewer sub-agent runs in a worktree with a different REPO_ROOT hash, the orchestrator can now pass --findings-file to explicitly locate the reviewer-findings.json written by the sub-agent. Backward compatible: flag is optional, existing behavior preserved. Tests added: test_record_review_findings_file_flag and test_record_review_findings_file_flag_missing_path in tests/hooks/test-record-review.sh. REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md and per-worktree-review-commit.md updated with worktree isolation guidance. All gate checks pass (2a/2c/2d not triggered).
